title: dryvist homelab nautobot_export contract (v1)
description: schema_version 1.0.0. Shape of the nautobot_export.json artifact published to the S3 artifact bucket by the Nautobot GraphQL export job (issue #138). Consumers read this artifact, never live Nautobot, so a full rebuild works with Nautobot down — the same pattern as ansible_inventory.json. Self-contained: every cross-reference resolves within this document (prefixes[].vlan -> vlans[].vid, devices[].rack -> racks[].name, interfaces[].device -> devices[].name, ip_addresses[].assigned_interface -> interfaces[].{device,name}). Breaking changes bump the major and add a versions/v<X.Y.Z>/ snapshot.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this contract. Consumers fail-fast when the major differs.

prefixes.description: IP prefixes (Nautobot Prefix objects). Each may reference a VLAN by vid.

ip_addresses.description: Assigned IP addresses / reservations (Nautobot IPAddress objects). Each may bind to an interface.

devices.description: Physical/virtual devices (Nautobot Device objects): Proxmox nodes, iDRACs, UniFi gear, LXC/VM guests.

racks.description: Racks (Nautobot Rack objects), each within a site.

interfaces.description: Device interfaces (Nautobot Interface objects). Each belongs to a device.

mac.description: IEEE 802 MAC address (colon-separated hex, either case); null when the object carries no MAC.

group.description: VLAN group name; null when the VLAN is ungrouped.

vlan.description: vid of the associated VLAN (resolves to vlans[].vid); null when unassociated.

role.description: Prefix role (e.g. mgmt, servers, dhcp-pool); null when unset.

address.description: IPv4 host address, with or without prefix length (Nautobot IPAddress.address).

dns_name.description: Forward DNS name for this address; null when unset.

assigned_interface.description: The interface this address is bound to (resolves to interfaces[] by device+name); null when unassigned.

role.description: Device role (e.g. proxmox_node, idrac, switch); null when unset.

rack.description: Rack name this device sits in (resolves to racks[].name); null when unracked.

bmc.description: Baseboard management controller (iDRAC/IPMI) reachability; null when the device has no BMC.

site.description: Site/location name the rack belongs to.

mgmt_only.description: true = management-only interface (excluded from data-plane assignment).
